sprint.goal: Fix security regression #924 (null byte bypass in canonicalizePath). v3.0 release readiness. EM spawned worker to implement fix directly after 3 cycles of stalled assignment.

senior.title: URL-encoded null byte (%00) bypasses canonicalizePath rejection
senior.note: EM escalated to director after 3 stalled cycles. EM spawned worker agent to implement fix directly. Branch created by worker.

blockers.description: Security regression — null byte bypass via URL encoding in canonicalizePath
